summary: FQ-09 visual inventory, toolbelt, and village panels: text-heavy UI becomes icon grids on the FQ-07 fallback pipeline. New data/items.json (display names, descriptions, swatch colors; validator-required per review); BlockRegistry.item_icon resolves art -> data color -> stable hash hue with a cache cleared alongside the visual cache; display_name falls back blocks -> items.json -> id. Toolbelt: five slot tiles with always-visible icons, counts, tooltips, gold selected border. Inventory panel: 6-column icon grid with hover descriptors above the unchanged detail text (legacy assertions intact). Town panel: stockpile icon grid with a toggled empty label; station buttons carry icons re-resolved every refresh (review fix). Keyboard/mouse behavior unchanged. fq07 hotbar check moved to art-vs-fallback semantics; the mine -> craft -> deposit -> load counts flow is verified through new grid helpers. Review: no must-fix; 2 should-fix + 4 nits applied. Smoke 179 -> 183.
scope: FQ-09 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Implementation commit 59a00e2 plus this evidence-only packet commit; pushed to origin/main.
next_action: FQ-10: more ores and metallurgy data.
